## ScreenShotPP v0.4.0

A feature release: capture windows that extend beyond the screen.

### New

- **Full-window capture for off-screen windows.** When the foreground window
  extends past the monitor (taller/wider than the screen, or spanning monitors),
  auto-selecting it now captures and shows the **whole** window — including the part
  that was off-screen — scaled to fit, fully annotatable, and exported at native
  resolution. Completely transparent: no new shortcut or mode. Normal captures,
  manual drag-selections, and maximized windows behave exactly as before.
